title: Reverse String
description:
Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as an array of characters s.

You must do this by modifying the input array in-place with O(1) extra memory.
constraints: s[i] is a printable ascii character
hints: Use two pointers, one at the start and one at the end
Swap characters and move pointers toward each other

title: Maximum Subarray
description: Given an integer array nums, find the subarray with the largest sum, and return its sum.
hints: Track the current sum and reset when it goes negative
